content.en:
Ye Tian did not obtain the third-layer Three Black Secret Method from the inheritance place of the Wu Mother Realm Lord, that inheritance place was just an ordinary inheritance place after all, and there was no third-layer Three Wu Secret Method.

There should be a lot of inheritance places for the lord of the Wumu realm, and other inheritance places may have the third layer of the Three Wu secret method.

However, the Lord of the Wumu Realm is the existence of the Sixth Realm, and this inheritance of the Sixth Realm is so precious, if anyone knows about it, they are absolutely unwilling to leak it.

Ye Tian didn't inquire about the inheritance of the Wumu Realm Lord, but there was no news, it was just rumored that the Jiaye Buddha Sect had a inheritance place of the Wumu Realm Lord, and there were several overlord-level forces that also occupied the inheritance land.

But it's just hearsay, and there is real evidence.

Even if it wasn't a rumor, it was impossible for Ye Tian to break into the inheritance land of these overlord-level superdimensional forces. "One-Six-Seven"

"Fortunately, there is no problem in a short period of time, let's investigate slowly first!"

He sent the copy body to inquire about the news of the third layer of the secret method of the black mother, but instead of letting the real body copy the body to investigate, he asked other people's copy bodies to investigate, and even if something happened, he would not find out about himself.

Really.

It didn't take long for his replica body to be targeted, and it was obvious that the Fourth Realm was interested in his Three Black Secret Method.

If he wants the third layer of the Three Black Secret Method, he must have the first and second layers of the Three Black Secret Method!

And for many Fourth Realm and even Tianguan powerhouses, once they obtain the Three Wu Secret Method, they can cultivate the second or even third innate multi-dimensional Dao body, how can they not be excited?

And he often encounters fake news, and it is still a trap arranged, and there is even an incomparably powerful Tianguan powerhouse who attacks and kills him, the strength of that Tianguan powerhouse is much stronger than Ye Tian, and the strength of the fifth Tianguan is definitely arranged, and it may reach the combat power of the sixth Tianguan.

"It seems that the allure of the Sanwu secret method is even more precious than I imagined!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

Fortunately, when he first attacked the White Bone Realm Lord of the Chilin Clan, only the Extinction Realm Lord knew that he possessed two innate multi-dimensional Dao bodies, and guessed that he had the Three Wu Secret Method, but he would not reveal this secret.

Otherwise, he's in trouble.

"It's still strength, if my strength is extremely strong, those powerhouses of the fifth and sixth day passes will definitely not dare to do anything to me!" Ye Tian thought.

In the years that followed, Ye Tian rarely inquired about the inheritance of the third layer of the Three Black Secret Method, and spent most of his time looking for resources, even if he obtained half of the wealth of a treasure house of the Chilin Clan, he still needed more wealth.

To this end, he broke into various forbidden places and Jedi to explore resources, sacrificing a replica body, but also obtained more and more resources, and his net worth became more and more abundant.

In a flash, another few hundred extradimensional epochs have passed.

this day.

Ye Tian finally created another eighth-dimensional will masterpiece.

This eighth-dimensional will mastery draws on the calamity of the wind, aiming to protect, and it is an eighth-dimensional will-mastery that focuses on defense.

In this way, even if he encounters the enemy's Eighth Dimensional Will Peerless Technique, he can rely on this Eighth Dimensional Will's Peerless Technique to resist attacks and protect his soul will.

This eighth-dimensional will mastery is to form a pagoda to protect the will of the soul, and the pagoda contains the power of the storm, which is an illusory tower of the storm.

For this reason, he named this Eighth Dimension Will Peerless Sect the Tower of the Wind Storm.

And not long after, he created his own method of refining the soul will-the Wind Tribulation Will Method.

The Wind Tribulation Will Method beats the soul will, and the Sword Mang Will Method forges the soul will, and after the combination of these two soul will refining methods, it has exerted an unexpected effect, which is eighty percent stronger than the previous effect.

Now, Ye Tian's soul will is improving with better efficiency.

Some more time passed, and Ye Tian's ten-dimensional celestial body had broken through to the limit of the first layer of Dacheng, and was about to break through to the second layer.

He prepared some ten-dimensional gravel, and also prepared a lot of four-dimensional multi-dimensional treasure essence, and with the help of these resources, he successfully raised the ten-dimensional celestial body to the second level of the realm, and the physical body was improved by a section.

......

Ten Dimensional Heavenly Gate.

Ye Tian entered here again, and he wanted to try to break through the fifth level of the Ten Dimensional Heavenly Gate Tower.

Level 5.

Thundered!!!!

Ye Tian's strength bloomed, and after killing the defender of the fifth level for a while, he successfully defeated him with a slight advantage, and he did not suffer any damage0...

Obviously, he is already a real fifth-day combat force!

However, among the powerhouses of the Fifth Heaven Pass, his extra-dimensional rule realm is estimated to be the lowest.

There is no way, he has been practicing for too little time, and he has no backer, and he has not obtained too many treasures that can help improve the superdimensional rule realm, so the superdimensional rule realm is not happy.

However, now that he has the combat power of the Fourth Realm and the Fifth Heaven Pass, he is qualified to compete, so there is no need to restrain him too much.

At the beginning, the Chilin Clan didn't even have a fourth-level powerhouse, so they occupied the Ten Dimensional Treasure Tree, and it was not too much for him to occupy other treasure lands.

And even if he only revealed one innate multi-dimensional Dao body of the Ka Ye Wisdom Body, it was enough to have the combat power of the Fourth Heavenly Pass, and he didn't have to worry about revealing the secret that he had three innate multi-dimensional Dao bodies.

Subsequently.

He began to find out where to find treasures that could help him comprehend the rules of the extradimensional dimension, and after some inquiry, he immediately had a goal.

"The Extreme of Silver!"

This is the name of a force, in the last multidimensional tribulation, this force was still extremely powerful, but unfortunately, in the last multidimensional tribulation, only a few of the fourth realms of this force survived, and the top few of the fourth realms all fell.

Now, after the development of time, the Extreme of the Silver Mountain has suffered many calamities, and now its strength is not strong, only one of the 4.2 fourth realm of the third level, and the fourth realm of the first level of the first level.

In terms of strength, it is not as good as the Chilin clan.

And the Extreme of the Silver Mountain has a Vein of the Silver Mountain, and there is a special area inside the Vein of the Silver Mountain, where if you cultivate and comprehend the rules of the Transcendent Dimension, the effect is extremely good.

However, that place is filled with a strange force, which is said to be one of the sources of countless multidimensional tribulations, causing mutations there, and if you stay there, a mysterious force will cause the body of the fourth realm to wither and eventually fall to death.

Therefore, the Fourth Realm did not dare to stay there for a long time, and after coming out, it would take countless hours to repair the physical body.

However, as a place to comprehend the extradimensional rules, the effect there is really good, and if the extradimensional rules do not exceed 5,000 paths, it is very good to meditate there.
